customManagers.description: Version pins annotated with `# renovate:` in chezmoi data files. Stored bare; extractVersionTemplate strips any upstream v so write-back is always bare.

packageRules.description: Codex publishes GitHub releases as `rust-vX.Y.Z`; strip the prefix so the pin stays bare and matches what mise/aqua installs.

Coding agents update on a 1-day cadence instead of the 3-day global bake. They flow through the release-notes summarizer, so each bump gets a human read before merge; the mise minimum_release_age never applies to them since they are exact-pinned.
